languages.text:
При получении урона от дот, наносит столько же импакт урона всем в области 4 клетки вокруг.
При смерти наложит 30 кровотечения, токсина и горения в радиусе 2

traits.locale_text:
При получении урона от дот, наносит столько же импакт урона всем в области 4 клетки вокруг.
При смерти наложит 30 кровотечения, токсина и горения в радиусе 2

languages.text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.
languages.original_text:
При получении урона от дот, наносит столько же импакт урона всем в области 4 клетки вокруг.
При смерти наложит 30 кровотечения, токсина и горения в радиусе 2

traits.locale_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of impact damage to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of impact damage to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

languages.text:
При каждом получении периодического урона существо наносит такой же {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} каждому существу в радиусе 4 клеток.
Когда существо уничтожено, оно накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} (30) или {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горение{/g} (30) на все цели в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг него.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
При каждом получении периодического урона существо наносит такой же {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} каждому существу в радиусе 4 клеток.
Когда существо уничтожено, оно накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} (30) или {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горение{/g} (30) на все цели в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг него.

При каждом получении периодического урона существо наносит такой же {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударный урон{/g} каждому существу в радиусе 4 клеток.
Когда существо уничтожено, оно накладывает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравление{/g} (30) или {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}горение{/g} (30) на все цели в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг него.

languages.text:
Chaque fois que la créature subit des effets de dégâts progressifs, elle inflige le même montant de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 4 cases autour d'elle.
Lorsqu'elle est tuée, elle applique {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} (30) ou {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} (30) à toutes les cibles dans un rayon de 2 cases autour d'elle.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
Chaque fois que la créature subit des effets de dégâts progressifs, elle inflige le même montant de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 4 cases autour d'elle.
Lorsqu'elle est tuée, elle applique {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} (30) ou {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Combustion{/g} (30) à toutes les cibles dans un rayon de 2 cases autour d'elle.

languages.text:
Yaratık, zamanla hasar veren etkilerden muzdarip olduğunda aynı miktardaki {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarını{/g} etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara verir.
Yaratık, öldüğünde etrafındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm hedeflerde {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} (30) veya {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} (30) oluşturur.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
Yaratık, zamanla hasar veren etkilerden muzdarip olduğunda aynı miktardaki {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarını{/g} etrafındaki 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara verir.
Yaratık, öldüğünde etrafındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm hedeflerde {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanama{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} (30) veya {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}yanma{/g} (30) oluşturur.

languages.text:
每当此生物受到持续伤害效果，就会对周围4格内的所有生物造成等量的{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}。
该生物被击杀时，对周围2格内的所有目标施加{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}（30）、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}（30）或{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}（30）。
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
每当此生物受到持续伤害效果，就会对周围4格内的所有生物造成等量的{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}。
该生物被击杀时，对周围2格内的所有目标施加{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}（30）、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}（30）或{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃烧{/g}（30）。

languages.text:
Siempre que la criatura sufra efectos de daño continuado, inflige esa misma cantidad de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a todas las criaturas situadas en un radio de 4 casillas a su alrededor.
Cuando la criatura muere, inflige {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} (30) o {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} (30) a todos los objetivos situados en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor.
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
Siempre que la criatura sufra efectos de daño continuado, inflige esa misma cantidad de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} a todas las criaturas situadas en un radio de 4 casillas a su alrededor.
Cuando la criatura muere, inflige {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} (30) o {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}quemadura{/g} (30) a todos los objetivos situados en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor.

languages.text:
Ist die Kreatur mit einem Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekt belegt, fügt sie allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 4 Feldern {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} in derselben Höhe zu.
Wird die Kreatur getötet, belegt sie alle Ziele in einem Radius von 2 Feldern mit {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} (30) oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} (30).
languages.original_text:
Whenever the creature suffers damage-over-time effects, it deals the same amount of {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} to every creature within a 4-cell radius around it.
When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

traits.locale_text:
Ist die Kreatur mit einem Schaden-über-Zeit-Effekt belegt, fügt sie allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 4 Feldern {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} in derselben Höhe zu.
Wird die Kreatur getötet, belegt sie alle Ziele in einem Radius von 2 Feldern mit {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} (30) oder {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}Verbrennen{/g} (30).

languages.text:
このクリーチャーがダメージ・オーバー・タイムの効果を受けている間は、周囲の4マス以内のすべてのクリーチャーに、同じ量の{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g}を与える。
このクリーチャーが倒されると、周囲の2マス以内のすべての対象に、{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}(30)、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}(30)、または{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}(30)を与える。

When the creature is killed, it inflicts {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (30), {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} (30), or {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} (30) on all targets within a 2-cell radius around it.

このクリーチャーが倒されると、周囲の2マス以内のすべての対象に、{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}(30)、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}(30)、または{g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}燃焼{/g}(30)を与える。
